# GoldenPipe

> Pipeline framework for data quality — compose Check, Flow, Match stages with pluggable routing and YAML config.

## Interfaces
- MCP Server: `goldenpipe mcp-serve` (4 tools: run_pipeline, validate_pipeline, list_stages, explain_pipeline)
- Remote MCP: https://goldenpipe-mcp-production.up.railway.app/mcp/ (4 tools, Smithery: https://smithery.ai/servers/benzsevern/goldenpipe)
- A2A Server: `goldenpipe agent-serve --port 8250` (4 skills)
- CLI: `goldenpipe run`, `goldenpipe validate`, `goldenpipe stages`, + 5 more commands
- Python API: `import goldenpipe` — `run()`, `run_df()`, `run_stages()`
- REST API: `goldenpipe serve` on port 8000

## Install
- `pip install goldenpipe` (standalone) or `pip install goldenpipe[golden-suite]` (with all tools)

## Docs
- [Architecture](CLAUDE.md): Framework design, stage system, engine layers
- [GitHub](https://github.com/benzsevern/goldenpipe): Source
- [Full API Reference](llms-full.txt): Extended documentation with all function signatures and usage patterns
